Home / Templates / Reference

Reference

Partials source

All built-in partials are in the Calepin repository under calepin/src/partials/. They are embedded in the binary at compile time.

Directory Contents
html/ HTML element and page templates (~49 files)
latex/ LaTeX element and page templates (~47 files)
typst/ Typst element and page templates (~44 files)
markdown/ Markdown element templates (~34 files)
website/ Website layout templates (navbar, sidebar, footer, etc.)
book/ Book layout templates
revealjs/ Reveal.js presentation template
common/ Format-agnostic templates (.jinja)

Override scheme

If _calepin/partials/ exists, Calepin uses only those files. Built-in templates are ignored entirely. If the directory does not exist, only built-in templates are used.

Within the partials directory, resolution tries target-specific first, then engine-specific, then common:

  1. _calepin/partials/{target}/{name}.{ext} (e.g., website/sidebar.html)
  2. _calepin/partials/{engine}/{name}.{ext} (e.g., html/figure.html)
  3. _calepin/partials/common/{name}.jinja

Per-document sidecar directories ({stem}_calepin/partials/) are checked before the project-level _calepin/partials/.

Element partial variables

Div variables

Fenced divs (::: {.classname #id key="value"} ... :::) receive:

Variable Description
children Recursively rendered content
classes Space-separated class list
id Element id (empty if none)
id_attr id="..." attribute string (empty if none)
label Format-specific label (\label{id} in LaTeX, <id> in Typst)
format Current output format
user attrs Any key="value" pairs from the div header

Template lookup tries each class in order, then falls back to div.{format}.

Span variables

Bracketed spans ( <span class="class">text</span>) receive:

Variable Description
content Text inside the brackets (rendered as inline markdown)
class First class
classes Space-separated class list
id / id_attr Same as divs
format Current output format
user attrs Any key-value pairs

Code block variables

Variable Description
code Raw source code
lang Language identifier
label Chunk label
highlighted Syntax-highlighted code
filename Filename header (if `#

Templates: code_source, code_output (output variable), code_diagnostic (shared by warnings, messages, errors).

Figure variables

Variable Description
src Resolved image file path
image Format-specific image tag
alt Alt text
caption Figure caption
label Figure label
number Auto-incremented figure number
width_attr / height_attr Format-specific dimension attributes
align Alignment: left, center, right
align_style Format-specific alignment markup
cap_location Caption position: top, bottom, margin
link Optional hyperlink wrapping the image

Theorem variables

Variable Description
type_name Capitalized type (“Theorem”, “Lemma”, “Definition”, …)
number Auto-incremented counter per type
type_class Original class name

Templates: theorem_italic (theorem, lemma, corollary, proposition, conjecture), theorem_normal (definition, example, exercise, solution, remark, algorithm).

Callout variables

Variable Description
callout_type Type without prefix: note, tip, warning, caution, important
title Title text (default: capitalized type name)
icon Emoji icon
collapse "true" or "false"
appearance "default" or user-provided

Page template variables

Content

Variable Description
body Rendered document content
toc Table of contents
preamble Extra preamble content from code chunks

Metadata

Variable Description
plain_title Title as plain text (markdown stripped)
title Title with inline markdown rendered
author Author(s), comma-joined
date Date string
lang Language code (default: "en")
generator "calepin X.Y.Z"

Pre-rendered blocks

Each produced through an overridable element template:

Variable Description
title Title markup
subtitle Subtitle markup
authors Author metadata (names, affiliations, ORCID)
date Date markup
abstract Abstract text
keywords Keywords list
appendix License, citation, copyright, funding
bibliography Bibliography section

Format-specific

Variable Format Description
css HTML <style> tag with default CSS
js HTML JavaScript block
math HTML KaTeX/MathJax script tags
bib_preamble LaTeX Bibliography preamble commands
bib_end LaTeX Bibliography end commands

Custom fields

Any non-standard front matter field is available as a template variable. A field custom_footer = "Confidential" becomes {{custom_footer}}.

Localization labels

Variable Default
label_abstract “Abstract”
label_keywords “Keywords”
label_appendix “Appendix”
label_citation “Citation”
label_reuse “Reuse”
label_funding “Funding”
label_copyright “Copyright”
label_listing “Listing”
label_proof “Proof”
label_contents “Contents”

Literal braces

Use {{_lb}} and {{_rb}} to insert literal { and } in templates.

Document body variables

Available when writing Jinja expressions in .qmd files:

Variable Description
meta.title, meta.author, meta.date, … Front matter fields
var.key, var.key.subkey Custom front matter fields (with nesting)
env.HOME, env.USER, … System environment variables
writer Current output format (html, latex, typst, markdown)
target Target name (defaults to writer)

Website template variables

Website templates (in _calepin/partials/website/) receive two context objects.

collection

Variable Description
collection.title Site title
collection.subtitle Site subtitle
collection.url Site URL
collection.favicon Favicon path
collection.pages Navigation tree (with active page marked)
collection.navbar Navbar configuration (left, middle, right items)
collection.dark_mode Whether dark mode is enabled
collection.math Math library script tags

document

Variable Description
document.title Page title
document.subtitle Page subtitle
document.date Page date
document.body Rendered HTML content
document.toc Table of contents HTML
document.url Page URL path
document.source_url Path to .qmd source
document.listing Listing items (for listing pages)
document.breadcrumbs Breadcrumb trail
document.prev Previous page (text, href)
document.next Next page (text, href)

var

Variables from the [var] section of _calepin/config.toml:

[var]
sidebar_collapse_level = 0

Website layout templates

Template Purpose
base.html Root layout: <head>, scripts, structure
page.html Document page (extends base.html)
listing.html Listing page (extends base.html)
navbar.html Top navigation bar
navbar_left.html Logo area
navbar_middle.html Navigation links
navbar_right.html Widgets (search, dark mode, source viewer)
sidebar.html Left sidebar with document tree
toc.html Right sidebar with table of contents
footer.html Page footer
breadcrumbs.html Breadcrumb trail
page_nav.html Previous/next links
page_header.html Title, date, author block
split_view.html Source viewer panel

The base template provides blocks: head_extra, content, page_nav.

Listings

A document can display a listing of other documents:

---
title = "Blog"

[listing]
contents = "posts/*.qmd"
type = "default"
sort = "date desc"
---
Option Description
contents Glob pattern for documents to list
type Layout: default (cards), table, or grid
sort Sort order: "date desc", "title asc", etc.

Built-in element templates

Template Used by
div Generic fenced divs
span Generic bracketed spans
emphasis Emphasized text
superscript Superscript text
code_source Code chunks (source)
code_output Code chunks (output)
code_diagnostic Warnings, messages, errors
code_listing Code listing wrapper
figure Figures and images
figure_div Figure div wrapper
table_div Table div wrapper
callout All callout types
theorem_italic theorem, lemma, corollary, proposition, conjecture
theorem_normal definition, example, exercise, solution, remark, algorithm
proof Proof environments
landscape Landscape-oriented sections
layout Grid layout container
layout_row Grid layout row
layout_cell Grid layout cell
tabset Tab navigation
title Document title
subtitle Document subtitle
authors Author block
author_item Individual author
affiliation_item Individual affiliation
date Document date
abstract Abstract text
keywords Keywords list
bibliography Bibliography section
citation How-to-cite block
appendix Appendix wrapper
copyright Copyright notice
license License block
funding Funding block
funding_item Individual funding source
corresponding Corresponding author
preamble Format-specific preamble
toc Table of contents
footnotes Footnote section (HTML)
math Math library includes (HTML)
pagebreak Page break
video Video embed
placeholder Placeholder image
url URL formatting
equation_label Equation label
escaped_dollar Literal dollar sign
